purpose: Single-file static emission factor and GWP reference for Scope 1 stationary-combustion factor lookup and CO2e conversion.

sources.title: Emission Factors for Greenhouse Gas Inventories
factor_basis_notes: Factors are per unit of heat content using higher heating values (HHV).
Supplier-provided heat content is preferred when available; otherwise the published default heat content may be used.
CO2 factors assume 100 percent oxidation of fuel carbon to CO2.
The factors represent combustion emissions only and exclude upstream emissions.

values.applicability_note: Use for stationary and mobile combustion, including combustion of fossil fuels, because combustion CO2 is already estimated separately and use of the higher fossil-methane GWP would double count the methane oxidation-to-CO2 effect.
Reserved for fossil-fuel fugitive sources and industrial processes where methane carbon is of fossil origin; not the default for combustion.

steps: co2e_kg = co2_kg * GWP(CO2) + ch4_kg * GWP(CH4_NON_FOSSIL) + n2o_kg * GWP(N2O)
co2e_kg = co2_kg * GWP(CO2) + ch4_kg * GWP(CH4_NON_FOSSIL) + n2o_kg * GWP(N2O)

selection_and_validation_rules.rule: Use supplier-specific HHV when available; otherwise use the published default HHV.
Use CH4_NON_FOSSIL GWP for stationary-combustion CH4.
Do not use EPA Hub Table 11 AR5 GWPs in this file; CO2e conversion uses the AR6 100-year GWP set included here.
For Kraft pulping liquor records without a published default HHV/native-unit factor, require activity already expressed in mmBtu or a documented supplier-specific heat-content conversion.

Biomass-category CO2 presentation/accounting must be handled by the applicable inventory methodology; this file preserves EPA combustion factors but does not decide separate biogenic-CO2 presentation.

scope_limitations: This is a static emission-factor-and-GWP reference, not a complete implementation of every 40 CFR Part 98 tier, monitoring, QA/QC, missing-data, or CEMS branch.
The uploaded AR6 source provides 100-year GWP values. This file must not be represented as a NY-specific GWP20 library.
EPA stationary-combustion factors exclude upstream and lifecycle emissions.
Published native-unit factors are retained as printed and may reflect source rounding.
